name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch  Beef Chunks inGravy 0.1kg
shortDescription: Delight your cat with Reflex Plus Beef Chunks in Gravy — a nourishing wet food made from tender beef and essential nutrients that promote vitality and overall wellbeing.
description: Reflex Plus Beef Chunks in Gravy Adult Cat Food in Pouch , fully-balanced, beef game protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) -?0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 0.3 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 5%), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
